name: Chocolate Pound Cake with Fudge Frosting^
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (163°C). Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
2. In a large bowl, beat butter and sugar until creamy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing just until the mixture is smooth.
4. Gradually combine the dry ingredients with milk, beginning and ending with flour, ensuring all are well incorporated after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10-15 minutes, then remove completely and let cool on a rack.
8. Prepare frosting by combining sugar, cocoa powder, salt, milk, and shortening in a saucepan.
9. Cook over medium heat until boiling, stirring constantly for 2 minutes.
10. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
11. Beat at high speed until smooth and of the proper consistency.
12. Frost cooled cake once it has fully cooled.
